name: Boilerplate Stripper
description: Remove navigation menus, cookie banners, footer disclaimers, and repeated boilerplate from scraped text to produce clean source material.
usage_notes: Works best with 3+ pages per entity for cross-page fingerprinting. Single-page entities still benefit from known-pattern stripping. Increase frequency_threshold toward 1.0 for conservative stripping; decrease toward 0.3 for aggressive stripping.

options.name: frequency_threshold
options.label: Frequency threshold
options.description: Fraction of pages a block must appear on to be considered boilerplate. 0.5 = block appears on half or more of pages.

options.name: min_block_length
options.label: Minimum block length (chars)
options.description: Blocks shorter than this are too small to fingerprint reliably and are ignored during cross-page analysis.

options.name: min_content_ratio
options.label: Minimum content ratio
options.description: If cleaned content is below this fraction of original length, flag the item as potentially over-stripped.

options.name: strip_known_patterns
options.label: Strip known boilerplate patterns
options.description: Also remove known boilerplate phrases (cookie banners, newsletter CTAs, social sharing) regardless of cross-page frequency.
